temporal_description: A tight, close-up shot focuses on the face of a man. His dark hair is disheveled and falls across his forehead. The lighting is dim and cool-toned, highlighting the sweat on his skin and the intensity in his eyes. He stares forward with a look of deep concern or distress. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a light color. The camera remains static, holding the intense close-up. The audio is filled with the sound of a man breathing heavily and erratically. His sharp, panicked inhales and exhales suggest he is in a state of extreme distress, fear, or physical exertion. The sound is raw and intense, with no background music or other ambient noise, placing all the focus on his distressed breathing. The shot cuts to an extreme close-up of the man's mouth. It is open in a silent scream or gasp, revealing his teeth and a significant amount of blood. The blood is smeared across his lips and chin. The camera is shaky, adding to the chaotic and violent nature of the moment. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner.
